name: Micron Technology, Inc.
description: Micron Technology, Inc. is a global leader in innovative memory and storage solutions that accelerate the transformation of information into intelligence. With a comprehensive portfolio of high-performance DRAM, NAND, and NOR memory and storage products, Micron serves diverse markets including data centers, networking, automotive, and consumer electronics. The company is at the forefront of the AI revolution, providing critical high-bandwidth memory (HBM) and advanced storage technologies that power the world's most sophisticated computing systems and data-driven applications.

investment_theses.company_type: Memory Chip Manufacturing / US Domestic Production
